name: External Aerodynamics Workflow
description: Post-processing workflow for automotive/aerospace external aerodynamics. Demonstrates pressure and velocity field analysis with streamlines.

steps.name: Step 1: Inspect dataset
steps.notes: Discover available fields (p, U, nut, etc.) and timesteps.

steps.name: Step 2: Pressure coefficient overview
steps.notes: Publication-quality pressure coefficient render with auto-framing.

steps.name: Step 3: Midplane velocity slice
steps.notes: Midplane (y=0) velocity field to visualize wake structure.

steps.name: Step 4: Streamlines visualization
steps.notes: Flow field streamlines to visualize separation, recirculation, and wake.

steps.name: Step 5: Velocity profile in wake
steps.notes: Vertical velocity profile 2m behind the body to quantify wake deficit.

steps.name: Step 6: Force integration
steps.notes: Integrate pressure over body surface for drag/lift force estimation.

steps.name: Step 7: Side-by-side comparison
steps.notes: Compare baseline vs modified geometry pressure distributions.
